title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
